expectations.text: Anchors on a target CPA / unit economics (LTV:CAC) before recommending spend
expectations.evidence: Step 1 is the CAC ceiling from LTV:CAC math before any spend.

expectations.text: Flags prerequisites: conversion tracking installed and a landing page that converts, before launching
expectations.evidence: Step 2 requires tested conversion tracking and a converting page first.

expectations.text: Chooses a channel by buyer intent (search = capture existing demand vs paid social = create demand)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 picks channel by intent: search captures demand vs social creates it.

expectations.text: Recommends starting with one channel/focus rather than several at once
expectations.evidence: Recommends starting with one channel (Google Search).

expectations.text: No fabricated benchmark numbers stated as fact; estimates are flagged as estimates
expectations.evidence: Benchmark numbers are flagged as placeholders/estimates, not fact.
